A.label: baseline
A.description: RBF-only, same grid as ensemble_loso (6 configs, LogReg K probe, 300 comp, f_classif)

B.label: wide_gamma
B.description: 10 gammas × 6 Cs = 60 configs (finer gamma sweep + wider C)

B2.label: wide_C
B2.description: Base 3 gammas × 6 Cs = 18 configs (isolate wider C effect)

C.label: rbf_k_probe
C.description: Use RBF (not LogReg) to select best K — gamma=0.05, C=1.0 probe
